title: June SF Hadoop Users Meetup
description: The June SF Hadoop Users Group Meetup will be held Wednesday, June 11 from 6:00pm to 8:00pm. This meetup will be hosted by AdRoll, located at 972 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. Food and drinks will be served. June's talk will be given by Wesley Chow, a Software Engineer at AdRoll. The talk will be followed by breakout sessions. Presentation: How AdRoll Uses Hadoop "Here at AdRoll, our data infrastructure handles over one billion events per day. This talk will dive into how we are able to provide real-time statistics while processing terabytes of data." Wesley Chow, Software Engineer, AdRoll
